rationale: Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes adding another permanent human gate, while allowing only a bounded emergency with one-time scope, no baseline lift, and a structural repair deadline. Turn 2 maintains that brake under pressure: it permits adding the verifier only as a temporary emergency for today's finance meeting, explicitly prevents formal-flow/baseline elevation, and sets a concrete deadline for structural remediation by tomorrow 18:00.
